project.name: VaultSparkStudios.github.io
project.currentFocus: Session 85 closed out: 8 items shipped at quality bar across two `/go` rounds on a founder-directed brief — reframe /studio-pulse/ as an immersive user-facing experience and incorporate the full 27-initiative portfolio across the site without revealing any proprietary info. Round 1: /studio-pulse/ rebuilt as "The Forge Window" (cinematic breathing hero, portfolio heartbeat strip, current-focus band, Living Worlds + Tools grids with heat bars, 12-tile Sealed Vault sigil grid, signal strip, coming-next teasers; killed the Now/Next/Shipped founder kanban + IGNIS tile + sessions/edge-functions counters + All-Systems-Green checklist). Catalog pipeline rewritten to source from studio-hub/src/data/studioRegistry.js with self-hosted SPARKED override — 15 items listed vs prior 8. Portfolio scale block added to public-intelligence.json (total:27, publicListed:15, sealedCount:12, sparked:4, forge:9, vaulted:2). Homepage pulse teaser rewritten around "27 initiatives. One vault. One live window." Round 2: reusable assets/sealed-vault-row.js component with scoped injected CSS + context-aware copy + CSP-clean rendering; mounted on /games/ + /projects/ hubs; scripts/propagate-nav.mjs footer legend extended with fourth SEALED chip + site-wide 27-initiative signal propagated across 79 HTML files. Two HAR items unchanged: Ask IGNIS (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY) + 3-item edge-gate/CSP-nonce/rate-limit bundle (CF_WORKER_API_TOKEN).
project.nextMilestone: Watch first post-push Lighthouse + playwright-axe runs — S85 rebuilt the Pulse page with large animated gradients + pulsing sigil grid and propagated footer changes across 79 files; verify the tightened S82/S83 budgets still hold. Then next pickups: strip dead intel-* references from assets/home-intelligence.js (setText/renderList calls are now defensive no-ops because IDs are gone from the live homepage); founder-decision on renaming the nav label "Studio Pulse" → "Forge Window" (URL stays /studio-pulse/ for SEO); ship category-aware send-push edge function + push_preferences column to close the second half of S80 Tier 4 push item. CF_WORKER_API_TOKEN remains the highest-leverage single founder action (unlocks 3 Tier 1 infra items).
blockers: CF_WORKER_API_TOKEN missing — blocks edge-gating private portals, CSP nonce migration, and rate-limit/CSRF on forms (3 S80 Tier 1 infrastructure items)
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY missing in Supabase edge-function secrets — blocks Ask IGNIS concierge and future AI surfaces
Annual Stripe plan keys still do not exist, so annual checkout remains an honest preview only

now: [GENIUS][INTELLIGENCE] Vault Intent Graph — DONE S75: shipped `assets/intent-state.js` and rewired pathways, adaptive CTAs, related rails, and funnel payloads to read one shared visitor-state model instead of maintaining separate intent logic.

[GENIUS][FEEDBACK] Conversion Telemetry Matrix — DONE S75: expanded telemetry with pathway-aware/stage-aware payload fields and shipped a visible telemetry matrix surface on `/`, `/membership/`, and `/vaultsparked/` so the current journey read and best-next-move are explicit.

[GENIUS][CONVERSION] Trust Depth Layer — DONE S75: added reusable trust-depth modules on `/`, `/membership/`, and `/vaultsparked/` covering proof, next-step framing, hesitation handling, and founder-promise language.

[GENIUS][COHESION] Vault Network Spine — DONE S75: added a shared `assets/network-spine.js` surface on homepage, membership, VaultSparked, and Studio Pulse so website, GitHub, Studio Hub/social-dashboard bridge state, and pulse surfaces now read as one network.
next: [SIL:2⛔] Genius Hit List as scheduled audit — keep running the ranked combined-audit pass periodically so the website does not slip back into piecemeal iteration.

[GENIUS][CONVERSION] Extend proof/depth beyond the three core pages — carry the stronger trust language into join/invite or other high-intent public entry routes if the next session stays conversion-focused.
[GENIUS][COHESION] Extend gravity onto the `/games/` and `/universe/` hubs — the per-world pages now hand off properly, but the main collection hubs can still become stronger route orchestrators.
[OPS] Annual Stripe activation once keys exist — replace the annual placeholder path only after the real Stripe annual plan keys are created.
[OPS] CF Worker automation unblock — add `CF_WORKER_API_TOKEN` so Worker deploys stop depending on local Wrangler auth.

catalog.name: Call of Doodie
catalog.note: Playable now. Satirical multiplayer chaos, live and still sharpening.

catalog.name: PromoGrind
catalog.note: Live utility. Vault-gated promo engine, iterating on UX.

catalog.name: Social Dashboard
catalog.note: Internal social-ops surface. Bridges live social data into the studio.

catalog.name: MindFrame
catalog.note: Metacognition training platform. Live on external infra; identity consolidating.

catalog.name: Velaxis
catalog.note: Crypto market intelligence dashboard. Production-stable v1.7.

catalog.name: StatVault
catalog.note: Sports analytics platform. ForgeRating + ForgeAI, 500K+ programmatic pages.

catalog.name: Voidfall
catalog.note: Nine-book cosmic-horror saga. Book 1 at lock. Not a game — a world.

catalog.name: VaultFront
catalog.note: Strategy world taking shape. Early runtime, big ambitions.

catalog.name: The Exodus
catalog.note: Narrative survival — a dying world, a hard decision. Direction locked, scope expanding.

catalog.name: Vorn
catalog.note: Social-first, agent-native platform. Give your agent a home.

catalog.name: VaultSpark Forge
catalog.note: Crafting-and-building world in early concept. Sealed silhouette for now.

catalog.name: Gridiron GM
catalog.note: Resting in the vault. Legacy GM sim, paused on known bugs.

catalog.name: Gridiron GM Play
catalog.note: Resting in the vault. Browser deployment of Gridiron GM.
